_comment_dashboard_skeleton: Grafana service-health dashboard skeleton. Copy to <app-root>/observability/dashboards/<name>.json and import via Grafana's dashboard-as-code sync (grafana-provisioning) or the API. Owning agent: observability-engineer.
_todo_ownership: TODO(observability-engineer): populate `datasource.uid` for the real Prometheus / Loki / Tempo instance before importing.
